title: ► Dustin Browder Interview: "Adding an unranked Draft Mode" - Heroes of the Storm

segments.text: all right guys so I'm here at the heroes
Summit in North America with Dustin
Browder and we just I saw the pretty
epic presentation I guess at that point
it's already public knowledge most of it
so yeah first of all thank you very much
for the opportunity to do the interview
here and as you can imagine I have a
couple of question mainly with all the
modes that you guys are putting out
right now so one of the things I was
actually a bit curious about you already
announced that in the changes to come
for rank mode for hero League uh you are
increasing the queue size again from
like 2 to three what exactly is this
thought process behind it like we
already had those Dynamic cues a long
time ago people weren't really happy
with it you went down to two there's
always been a bit of discussion about it
what kind of thought process had did you
guys have going now for thre men Q once
again well our goal with the the qes has
always been get as many players as
possible who want to play together
playing with the with one another one of
the challenges we have with the three
and the fourman qes is our Matchmaker
wasn't really at a place where it could
hold up and provide quality matches to
players in the four-man qes in
particular were causing a lot of
problems but the three-man qes weren't
helping us at all either and so as a
defensive move we pulled those out to
make our matchmaking process easier and
that was um before BlizzCon last year
when our Matchmaker was really
struggling to to uh match people
correctly we've done a lot of
improvements to the Matchmaker since
then and with this new rank play update
we're introducing a change where you
cannot group together with somebody who
is of a significantly different skill
level than you are um so you're going to
be pretty close so you won't be able to
have those bronze and Diamond level
players grouping up making the
Matchmaker like I don't know what to do
right like it is know how to handle that
kind of insanity and so by for like
you're all pretty much gold um now
you're led to group we think that the
Matchmaker will be able to hold up to
that um we've done some simulations on
it we've looked at you know current data
and said no this Matchmaker be it should
make some good quality matches um even
up to three players so we're going to
test three players and see if that does
maintain sort of good quality matches
for our players we'd love to be able to
have as many players as possible but we
think three is probably the limit right
now and we'll we'll sort of see where
this goes one of the things that a lot
of people have already been talking
about kind of like catering towards the
same idea is that people have been
saying like what about additional game
modes would it for example be something
that you guys consider putting in some
kind of quick match mode where you have
a draft as well where you allow like
fourman qes five men qes outside of Team
league and of course there's a couple of
downsides people are always talking
about is the player base really big
enough to cater towards something like
this people of course want to prevent
that you queue for like an hour to find
a game there just exaggerating things a
little bit are additional game modes in
that sense to like just put a bit more
diversity in something that you are
currently considering or is it something
where you are saying we want to focus on
the game modes we have for now and maybe
in the distant future we can add
something like what's the thoughts on
that well we want to avoid as many modes
as we possibly can we have the fewest
possible modes but we do understand
there's a diverse Community with a lot
of different interests out there so
we're definitely looking at an unranked
draft especially coming out now that
we're restricting players in their
ability to play together if they're
different skill levels so I know I have
several players that I play with where
we're very different skill levels I have
rank one players that I play with that
I'm nowhere near rank one and in this
world we would't be able to play Draft
together anymore so we are going to add
an unranked draft mode which will allow
that to happen we're going to see how
that goes we certainly had a lot of very
positive feedback from the community
towards that direction but I want to see
is that a dead mode you know I I I know
I'll plan it I know I I believe some
people will playing it um we'll see
we'll see how it goes um it's not really
about population size you know we we've
got lots and lots of players in this
game but we do um players do gravitate
towards um you know certain gameplay
modes and so we really want to make sure
that we don't have as few modes as
possible that create the best possible
play experience so unranked draft is
almost a certainly at this point I
believe we are going to add it um
hopefully very quickly here so we can
get into players hands especially as we
roll out this new rank play system and
I'm certainly open to people's feedback
of what other modes they' want to see
but we're going to examine each mode
very carefully say is this adding real
value to The Gamers just a little tweak
doesn't really change it that much and
now we're in a position where we're
really dividing up our matchmaking
buckets even more making matchmaking
more challenging if you would add
additional modes that would of course
also mean that rank that there's like a
lot more options for players that want
to clue with a lot of friends as we just
like also mentioned uh is that something

3an queue now again for hero League
we're going to that you're going to look

right now we have our Matchmaker
Matchmaker like much better we have the

like put us in a position where you can
like handle that uh is it something that

depending on what the the players want
we might even be reducing that again
nothing in this game is fixed we're
we're always listening to feedback we're

a giant team of people constantly

aren't fixed our talents aren't fixed
our matchmaking isn't fixed even this
rank play System we're rolling out right

the reasons you know that we like coming

to be able to make a sudden change if

I'm probably not going to be able to fix

we're not dying on any Hills here
there's nothing about this game that we

uh one of the things that I also wanted

try to take into consideration which

but certainly an option for us uh I

it's just human nature like I got other

don't really feel like there's that much

not like we're like ah that guy he'll
take whatever he really won't and and
and remember too that gold guy if he's
if if I'm giving him whatever that
whatever might be a diamond player and
he's not happy either so there really is

who's in it no one's in that place
everybody wants the best game we can
possibly give them as quickly as
possible but they want the best game we

but I we're not I don't feel like the

there right nobody wants to nobody wants

maybe maybe then may maybe we start
